buildings.description: Basic canvas shelters for weary adventurers. Not comfortable, but better than sleeping in the dungeon.
buildings.function: Provides basic overnight rest for adventurers

buildings.description: A proper inn with beds, hot meals available, and a common room for swapping tales.
buildings.function: Provides standard rest with morale benefits

buildings.description: A prestigious establishment with private suites, fine dining, and amenities fit for heroes.
buildings.function: Full rest with stat buffs and private suites for residents

buildings.description: The finest accommodations in the realm. Legendary adventurers demand nothing less.
buildings.function: Exceptional rest with all stat bonuses and passive XP gain
buildings.special: Legendary adventurers will ONLY stay here

buildings.description: A humble drinking hole where adventurers can grab a meal and share stories.
buildings.function: Provides meals and minor morale boost

buildings.description: A lively establishment with good food, flowing ale, and a rumor board for dungeon tips.
buildings.function: Good meals, ale, rumor board for dungeon intel
buildings.special: Bard adventurer residents provide +5 town-wide morale

buildings.description: The social heart of the town. Festivals, performances, and the best ale in the realm.
buildings.function: Exceptional dining, entertainment, quest rumor board
buildings.special: Generates 1 random positive event per 30 in-game days

buildings.description: Simple communal baths. Cleanliness is next to godliness, and disease-free.
buildings.function: Sanitation, morale, minor curse resistance

buildings.description: Mineral-rich waters that soothe wounds and cleanse minor curses.
buildings.function: Sanitation, HP regen, curse cleansing

buildings.description: Magically infused waters that restore body, mind, and spirit.
buildings.function: Full restoration, strong curse resistance, weekly buff

buildings.description: Basic adventuring supplies: rations, torches, rope, and minor potions.
buildings.function: Sells basic adventuring supplies

buildings.description: Expanded inventory with better potions, maps, and gear accessories.
buildings.function: Broader supplies, unlocks caravan events

buildings.description: Full catalog of supplies including rare items and dungeon-specific consumables.
buildings.function: Full catalog, rare items, bulk discounts for residents

buildings.description: Open-air market where local goods fetch better prices than imports.
buildings.function: Dynamic pricing hub for production chain goods

buildings.description: Full trade hub with automatic supply routing between buildings.
buildings.function: Inter-building supply routing, supply/demand pricing

buildings.description: Regional trade hub attracting merchants from across the realm.
buildings.function: Regional trade, traveling merchants, toll income

buildings.description: Secure gold storage and fair rates for converting dungeon loot.
buildings.function: Gold storage, loot conversion, adventurer deposits

buildings.description: Full banking services including loans, interest, and adventurer insurance.
buildings.function: Loans, interest on deposits, death insurance

buildings.description: Financial center with investments, futures trading, and inter-town routes.
buildings.function: Investments, futures trading, trade routes

buildings.description: Marketplace for rare dungeon loot. The town takes a cut of every sale.
buildings.function: Rare item trading, premium loot sales

buildings.description: Legendary items change hands here. Wealthy merchants visit from afar.
buildings.function: Legendary items, cross-region reputation, commissions

buildings.description: A basic forge producing iron weapons and armor for novice adventurers.
buildings.function: Produces Common quality iron weapons and armor

buildings.description: An established forge working iron and steel into Uncommon gear.
buildings.function: Produces Uncommon quality weapons, armor, shields, tools

buildings.description: A master smithy producing Rare steel gear with enchantable slots.
buildings.function: Produces Rare quality gear with enchantable slots

buildings.description: Where legends are made. Mithril and dragon scale become weapons of myth.
buildings.function: Produces Epic-Legendary quality gear and unique named weapons
buildings.special: Named weapons become town lore items that attract Legendary adventurers

buildings.description: Simple booth crafting bows, crossbows, and ammunition.
buildings.function: Produces Common quality ranged weapons and ammo

buildings.description: Full workshop producing composite weapons and specialty arrows.
buildings.function: Produces Uncommon ranged weapons and specialty ammo

buildings.description: Master crafters producing enchanted bows and elemental ammunition.
buildings.function: Produces Rare-Epic ranged weapons and class-specific gear

buildings.description: A humble shop brewing minor potions and remedies.
buildings.function: Produces minor health potions, antidotes, bandages

buildings.description: A proper laboratory producing standard potions and elixirs.
buildings.function: Produces health/mana potions, buff elixirs, all antidotes

buildings.description: Master alchemists brewing legendary elixirs and transmuting materials.
buildings.function: Produces supreme potions, legendary elixirs, transmutation
buildings.special: Philosopher's Stone reduces all production costs 10% for 30 days

buildings.description: Mystic trinkets and spell components for the magically inclined.
buildings.function: Sells spell components, cantrip scrolls, basic staves

buildings.description: Full magical services: scrolls, enchanted gear, identify services.
buildings.function: Full scroll library, enchanted gear, spell tomes, identify

buildings.description: The pinnacle of magical craft. Legendary gear and portal scrolls.
buildings.function: Legendary arcane gear, custom enchantments, portal scrolls
buildings.special: Unlocks Mages Circle faction quest line

buildings.description: A humble shrine offering basic healing and death rites.
buildings.function: Basic healing, death rites for morale management

buildings.description: A proper temple with full healing, blessings, and minor resurrection.
buildings.function: Full healing, divine blessing, minor resurrection

buildings.description: A magnificent cathedral offering full resurrection and miracles.
buildings.function: Full resurrection, powerful blessings, curse removal, miracles
buildings.special: Attracts Paladin and Cleric legendary adventurers exclusively

buildings.description: The adventurers' first stop. Registration, basic quests, and guild benefits.
buildings.function: Adventurer registration, basic quest board, guild benefits

buildings.description: Full guild services: training, ranks, faction contacts, materials exchange.
buildings.function: Full quests, training, guild ranks, materials exchange

buildings.description: The pinnacle of guild services. Tournaments, expeditions, and legendary ranks.
buildings.function: Epic quests, advanced training, tournaments, legendary ranks
buildings.special: Veteran+ adventurers will only commit to residency in towns with Grand Guild

buildings.description: Basic farmland producing grain for the town.
buildings.function: Produces grain

buildings.description: Expanded farmland with irrigation for increased yield.
buildings.function: Produces more grain

buildings.description: A grand estate producing massive quantities plus rare crops.
buildings.function: Produces grain and rare crops

buildings.description: A small garden growing medicinal herbs.
buildings.function: Produces herbs

buildings.description: An expanded garden with a variety of medicinal plants.
buildings.function: Produces more herbs

buildings.description: A magically-enhanced garden producing rare magical herbs.
buildings.function: Produces herbs and magical herbs

buildings.description: A camp for harvesting timber from the surrounding forest.
buildings.function: Produces wood

buildings.description: An organized operation with better tools and more workers.
buildings.function: Produces more wood

buildings.description: A stone quarry providing building materials.
buildings.function: Produces stone

buildings.description: A deeper quarry accessing better stone deposits.
buildings.function: Produces more stone

buildings.description: A massive quarry operation with industrial-scale output.
buildings.function: Produces large amounts of stone

buildings.description: A mine extracting iron ore from the earth.
buildings.function: Produces iron ore

buildings.description: A deeper mine accessing richer ore veins.
buildings.function: Produces more iron ore

buildings.description: A legendary mine accessing mithril deposits.
buildings.function: Produces mithril ore

buildings.description: A furnace for smelting iron ore into ingots.
buildings.function: Converts iron ore to iron ingots

buildings.description: An advanced foundry capable of producing steel.
buildings.function: Produces steel

buildings.description: A legendary foundry capable of smelting mithril.
buildings.function: Produces mithril ingots

buildings.description: A brewery producing ale for the tavern.
buildings.function: Produces ale from grain

buildings.description: An expanded brewery with special brews.
buildings.function: Produces ale and special brews

buildings.description: A bakery turning grain into bread.
buildings.function: Produces bread from grain

buildings.description: A larger bakery with higher output.
buildings.function: Produces more bread

buildings.description: A simple cottage housing town workers.
buildings.function: Houses workers for staffing buildings

buildings.description: A comfortable home for town citizens.
buildings.function: Houses more workers

buildings.description: A grand manor housing wealthy citizens.
buildings.function: Houses workers and provides morale

buildings.description: The administrative center of the town.
buildings.function: Town policy, upgrade center, population cap

buildings.description: A proper town hall for a growing settlement.
buildings.function: Expanded policy, higher population cap

buildings.description: A magnificent seat of power for a legendary town.
buildings.function: Full policy suite, maximum population cap

buildings.description: A small outpost for town guards.
buildings.function: Crime prevention, basic town defense

buildings.description: A tower providing better visibility and defense.
buildings.function: Enhanced defense, early warning

buildings.description: A full garrison with active patrols.
buildings.function: Strong defense, active patrols, raid reduction

buildings.description: The maw of the dungeon. Adventure awaits within.
buildings.function: Entry point to the dungeon

buildings.description: Basic communal sleeping quarters. Cheap but cramped.
buildings.function: Houses multiple townsfolk in shared quarters

buildings.description: A small farmhouse with adjacent fields. Workers here boost nearby farm output.
buildings.function: Houses farm workers with productivity bonus
buildings.special: Must be placed adjacent to a Farm for bonus

buildings.description: Connected townhomes offering efficient housing density.
buildings.function: Efficient high-density housing for townsfolk

buildings.description: A comfortable home with attached workshop space for skilled workers.
buildings.function: Houses specialists with workshop proximity bonus

buildings.description: A large house offering rooms for rent to workers and travelers alike.
buildings.function: Mixed housing for townsfolk and adventurers

buildings.description: Barracks-style housing for guild members with training facilities.
buildings.function: Adventurer housing with guild training bonus
buildings.special: Must be adjacent to Guild Hall for training bonus

buildings.description: A grand residence for wealthy citizens and accomplished adventurers.
buildings.function: Premium housing for specialists and adventurers

buildings.description: A dedicated facility for adventurers with training grounds and equipment storage.
buildings.function: Premium adventurer housing with training area
buildings.special: Adventurers gain passive XP while resting here
